build.notes: Build completed successfully with only performance warnings (bundle size). No TypeScript errors.

lint.notes: Pre-existing lint warnings unrelated to FAQ schema feature. 4 errors in other blocks (AccordionItem BaseControl missing id, TestimonialsCarousel nested ternary). No new errors introduced by FAQ schema implementation.

registration.notes: enableFaqSchema attribute correctly defined in block.json with type boolean and default false.

questions: How do I access my health benefits?

edgeCases.notes: All edge cases handled correctly per planning spec

googleFaqSpec.answerFormat: PASS - Each has @type: Answer, text (plain text)

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors
Attribute enableFaqSchema correctly defined in block.json (boolean, default false)
Attribute included in TSX type definition (AccordionAttributes)
Attribute included in PHP @var docblock
ToggleControl for FAQ schema in Behavior panel (TSX)
ToggleControl has correct label: 'Enable FAQ schema (SEO)'
ToggleControl has correct help text: 'Outputs FAQPage structured data for search engines'
JSON-LD script tag output when enableFaqSchema=true
No JSON-LD script tag when enableFaqSchema=false (default)
JSON-LD structure follows Google FAQPage spec
@context is https://schema.org
@type is FAQPage
mainEntity is an array of Question objects
Each Question has @type: Question, name (string), acceptedAnswer (Answer object)
Each Answer has @type: Answer, text (string)
Answer text is plain text (HTML tags stripped with wp_strip_all_tags)
Empty items (no title) are excluded from schema
Empty items (no content) are excluded from schema
No schema output if all items are empty
wp_json_encode uses JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE flags
Script tag placed after closing </section> tag
Test page includes variation with enableFaqSchema=true
Test page shows 4 valid FAQ items in the schema
TSX/PHP sync: enableFaqSchema attribute consistent across block.json, TSX, PHP
No manual $attributes[] extraction in PHP (uses auto-extracted variables)
PHP @var docblock includes @var bool $enableFaqSchema
All existing accordion features still work (verified 13 accordion blocks on test page)
Build passes (no TypeScript errors)
Live page source contains valid JSON-LD script tag
Only blocks with enableFaqSchema=true output the schema (1 out of 13 blocks)
